title: Resources
text:
---
title: Deployed Services
description: Deployed Services
---
import { Badge } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';

Although you can run your own containers, there are services and resources 
already deployed by cluster admins that you can use without creating those yourself.

:::caution
Most services require additional registration. **[Contact us](https://nrp.ai/contact) to set up your account if the service you need requires login, but has no registration form.**
:::

<Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> - Service is **generally supported**. You can report issues with the service.

<Badge text="Unsupported" variant="caution" /> - Service is provided **as is**. You can report the issues but those will be checked with lowest priority. The service may be removed at any time.

<Badge text="Experimental" variant="tip" /> - The service is added **for testing**. Likely to have bugs or change at any time. Also may be removed at any time.

Live statuses for major services are available in [**Services Status**](/services-status/). **Please report broken services in [Nautilus Support](/documentation/userdocs/start/support/).**

## Computations

- [<Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> JupyterHub][1] [(Docs)](/documentation/userdocs/jupyter/jupyterhub-service)
- [<Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> Coder: remote development environment][13] [(Docs)](/documentation/userdocs/coder/coder)
- [<Badge text="Stable" variant="success" /> Kubevirt: Virtual Machines][2]
- [<Badge text="Unsupported" variant="caution" /> WebODM (Web Open Drone Map): Drone Images stitching][4]
- [<Badge text="Unsupported" variant="caution" /> SuperSplat: 3D Gaussian Splatting][9]
